strengths: 13+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching the primary stack
Direct AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role
Strong engineering craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms work ~2016-2018)
Cloud/container depth unclear — AWS CDK mentioned but no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production specifics beyond GISCollective
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, a strong craftsmanship culture (TDD, pairing, CI/CD), and directly relevant experience in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AI-agent tooling including MCP — closely aligned with the role's internal automation tooling focus. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js exposure and limited recent Kotlin/Java work, though the polyglot history suggests rapid ramp-up is plausible.
